rules: imagery should have high appetite appeal
silo images should be photographed consistently according to packaging or product type
minimize reflections on plastic, foil, and shiny packaging, especially when covering important product information
remove unnecessary stickers not part of package design, such as special promotion stickers or legal declarations
packaging and labels should be presented straight, not angled or crooked
photograph each unique and meaningful side of the product package
for round or irregular shapes, present sides so printed information and graphics are centered and legible
front view is the side with predominant brand and labeling, format, variant, and size/quantity
products should be evenly lit from side to side and top to bottom
exposure and color should correctly represent the item
maintain separation between product and background
clip products onto pure white background, RGB 255/255/255
retouch dirt, dust, fingerprints, damage, blemishes, expiration dates, lot numbers, and sample-only information
lifestyle images should be realistic, professionally lit, and styled appropriately to the item and brand
product being sold should remain the hero of the lifestyle image
packaging should be incorporated into lifestyle images when practical to connect lifestyle images to silo shots
items must display all indicated required images and conditionally required images and meet the minimum image count listed on each page

main_image.label: Main Image
main_image.description: Primary carousel image/hero image for the PDP.

silo_front.label: Silo, Front
silo_front.guidance: Show the product straight-on on a pure white background with full visibility and accessories empty unless needed to communicate scale.
silo_front.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image on pure white with the full product visible and accessories empty unless needed for scale.

silo_front_in_pack.label: Silo, Front, In Pack
silo_front_in_pack.guidance: Show the complete product packaging from a straight-on, front-facing angle. Shoot on white with no shadow or keystoning.
silo_front_in_pack.recommendation: Add a straight-on front packaging image on white with no shadow or keystoning.

lifestyle_in_use.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_in_use.guidance: Show the product in a realistic, natural setting that reflects everyday use with the product as the focal point and minimal distraction.
lifestyle_in_use.recommendation: Add a lifestyle image showing the product in realistic everyday use with the pet/product as the focal point.

lifestyle_active_play.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_active_play.guidance: Show a pet actively playing with the toy in a natural setting with the product in sharp focus; motion blur on the pet is acceptable.
lifestyle_active_play.recommendation: Add an active-play lifestyle image showing the pet interacting with the toy, with the product in sharp focus.

dimensions.label: Dimensions
dimensions.recommendation: Add a dimensions graphic showing product size clearly.

dimensions_pet_size.label: Dimensions
dimensions_pet_size.guidance: Overlay interior and exterior dimensions clearly on the product image, and for sizing-sensitive items include a breed or weight size guide or human scale reference.
dimensions_pet_size.recommendation: Add a dimensions graphic with interior/exterior measurements plus breed, weight, or scale reference when size-sensitive.

dimensions_toy_size.label: Dimensions
dimensions_toy_size.guidance: Show product dimensions overlaid on the silo or include a size comparison using a familiar object, and for breed-sized toys reference the intended dog size category.
dimensions_toy_size.recommendation: Add a toy dimensions graphic using measurements or a familiar-object size comparison and intended dog size category when relevant.

feature_graphic.label: Feature Graphic
feature_graphic.guidance: Highlight structural, functional, play, health, grooming, training, material, performance, odor-control, capacity, or safety benefits using clean callout graphics.
feature_graphic.recommendation: Add a clean feature graphic highlighting key benefits, function, performance, safety, durability, usage, capacity, or material claims.

graphic_supplement_fact.label: Graphic, Supplement Fact
graphic_supplement_fact.guidance: Show the Supplement Facts, ingredients, or usage instructions clearly legible in a straight-on shot with no glare or distortion.
graphic_supplement_fact.recommendation: Add a flat Supplement Facts, ingredients, or usage-instructions graphic with no glare or distortion.

graphic_installation.label: Graphic, Installation
graphic_installation.guidance: Show installation or setup configuration, and for wireless fences or bark devices include a clear range or coverage area graphic with distance callouts.
graphic_installation.recommendation: Add an installation or setup graphic showing configuration, range, coverage, or distance callouts where relevant.

graphic_breed_size_guide.label: Breed / Size Guide
graphic_breed_size_guide.guidance: Include a breed or weight-based size guide to help customers select the correct size for their pet.
graphic_breed_size_guide.recommendation: Add a breed or weight-based size guide to help customers select the correct size.

graphic_compatibility.label: Compatibility Graphic
graphic_compatibility.guidance: Call out compatible pet types, breeds, or life stages for this product.
graphic_compatibility.recommendation: Add a compatibility graphic showing compatible pet types, breeds, or life stages.

graphic_use_occasion.label: Use Occasion Graphic
graphic_use_occasion.guidance: Show the product?s ideal use context, such as travel, home, or outdoor, through a simple iconographic or lifestyle graphic.
graphic_use_occasion.recommendation: Add a use-occasion graphic showing the ideal context such as travel, home, or outdoor use.

graphic_safety_seal.label: Brand / Safety Seal
graphic_safety_seal.guidance: Include the brand?s safety or quality certification graphic if applicable.
graphic_safety_seal.recommendation: Add a brand safety or quality certification graphic when applicable.

silo_components.label: Included Components
silo_components.guidance: Show all included components in a clean, organized flat-lay with labels or callouts highlighting key pieces.
silo_components.recommendation: Add a flat-lay image showing all included components with labels or callouts.

additional_recommendations: Breed / Size Guide: Include a breed or weight-based size guide to help customers select the correct size for their pet.
Collection Image: Show the full product family or size range in a styled group arrangement.
Compatibility Graphic: Call out compatible pet types, breeds, or life stages for this product.
Brand / Safety Seal: Include the brand?s safety or quality certification graphic if applicable.
Use Occasion Graphic: Show the product?s ideal use context, such as travel, home, or outdoor, through a simple iconographic or lifestyle graphic.
notes: Preserve repeated feature_graphic because the source page shows two separate feature graphics.
One feature graphic highlights structural or functional features such as mechanism, durability, ventilation, or capacity.
The other feature graphic shows the product assembled or ready-to-use, and displays a simple step graphic for assembly or fold-down when applicable.
Dimensions should overlay interior and exterior dimensions and include breed, weight, or human scale reference for sizing-sensitive items.
Maintain a consistent visual approach across product photography with consistent angles to ensure a unified presentation.
Individual brand guidelines should take precedence.
Animal imagery should clearly communicate pet type, breed/size fit, life stage, safe use, capacity, setup, and real use context when relevant.
Keep products as the focal point even when pets or people appear in lifestyle imagery.
